curation_notes: Locations derived from the advisory description (which explicitly names app/admin/controller/api/Update.php and app/wechat/controller/api/Push.php) and confirmed by the patch diff (commit 6ccd405). The patch adds ['allowed_classes' => false] to unserialize() calls in Update.php (function tree, lines 46-47) and Push.php (function index, line 102). Only 2 non-test source files changed. No sibling files in either API directory use unserialize(). Vulnerability class insecure-deserialization confirmed from CWE-502 and the patch which directly restricts PHP object instantiation during deserialization.
